description: A customer calls to cancel an order they placed an hour ago.

nodes.task_description: Find the customer's order and check its status.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the order and confirms its status is 'Processing', not 'Shipped'.

nodes.task_description: Cancel the order in the system.
Ensure the payment authorization is voided and the customer will not be charged.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies that the payment transaction has been voided.
